posts.text: This is why @xriskology & I call them the TESCREAL bundle. It doesn't matter whether they're effective altruists or not, this is a family squabble in a family we want to stay away from, like a squabble between the Brits or French during the scramble for Africa.

posts.text: "A female agent wearing a gaiter-style mask rolled down the window, leaned out — and addressed Emily by name.  “She yelled, ‘Emily, Emily, we're going to take you home!’ Then she looked at her phone and she recited my home address,” she says.”
posts.quote: "A female agent wearing a gaiter-style mask rolled down the window, leaned out — and addressed Emily by name.  “She yelled, ‘Emily, Emily, we're going to take you home!’ Then she looked at her phone and she recited my home address,” she says.”

posts.text: ...and took a picture of me and my car,” she says.  Emily says she decided to leave at that point, but the SUV made a sudden U-turn and barreled towards her, braking next to her driver's side window."

posts.text: Always unnerving to see people treating war like its a sports game, supporting their teams like it isn't something with extraordinary destruction that, under the BEST circumstance, those who haven't been obliterated will need to spend many decades attempting to rebuild from.
